extracted.title: NEXUS Customer Specific Operational Flow Order -- LIFTED EFF 2/10
extracted.description:
Effective 9:00AM CCT February 10, 2026, NEXUS Gas Transmission, LLC (NEXUS) is lifting the customer specific Operational Flow Order issued on February 6, 2026.

Operational Area | Gas Day Feb 9 | Gas Day Feb 10 and until further notice
Customer Specific | OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe OFO 2% / 250 | No OFO

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
